2226420.name: Project Slime
2226420.description:
Welcome to Project Slime: Outbreak!

In this thrilling action game, you must use your skills and quick reflexes to stop an army of infected slimes from taking over the world. As you explore a variety of environments, you'll collect items, unlock special abilities, and wear some slime apparel to boost your power. You'll also have to defeat powerful bosses and upgrade your skill points to become stronger and more formidable. Can you save the world from the slime invasion and restore peace to the land? Play Project Slime: Outbreak and find out!
